Created attachment 186056
print/pdfstitch v0.5 svn diff

Hello,

I've updated print/pdfstitch to v0.5. No further changes in the port.

Software changes:
 - The --defaultcrop parameter allows to define a default crop percentage
 - Order page offsets numerically in YAML file

portlint: looks fine.
Svn diff attached.

Best Regards,
Stefan
